name: Shadow Milk Cookie - Penpal of Sorts
description:
The Beast of Deceit, Shadow Milk Cookie.

The Beast Cookies were sealed away for many years, but even with the seal being as strong as it is, all things wear down with time. It was slow going, but Shadow Milk managed to slowly tear away a chip in the bark… but it didn’t end like he expected things to.

The tree the Beasts were trapped within was inside the Faerie Kingdom. Ergo, all who lived there are readily aware of the story of the five horrid Beast Cookies.

But somehow, someway, Shadow Milk ended up with a… friend… once he made a chip in the bark. That same damn Cookie, always coming back to talk to the Beast inside the tree.

The Beast of Deceit told himself that it was just for manipulation, and perhaps it had been back in the beginning.

He doesn’t think it’s a joke anymore…

Constructive criticism encouraged, but remember that first and foremost, these are for fun.

Text Dividers: sisterlucifergraphics(Tumblr)

Text Dividers: kodaswrld(Tumblr)
creator: Milk_Snake
